text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, October 13. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted the plans. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the schedule covered. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Let's organize the menu. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: I can help troubleshoot that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. That's a big step. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Prepping school lunches for the week. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
